strengths: Clear structure with headers and sections
Specific details and numbers provided for state variables and parameters

weaknesses: Some sections are brief and lack detailed information (e.g., budget, contacts)
Language is not entirely clear, with some sections using non-English text
Lack of specific dates and tasks in the project parameters section
top_fixes: Translate all non-English text to English for clarity and consistency
Provide more detailed information in the budget and contacts sections
Add specific dates and tasks to the project parameters section
blocking_issues: Lack of clear licensing information for the project (MIT / CC-BY is mentioned, but not confirmed)
